items.headline: Trump warns to 'blow up' South Pars gas field in Iran if strikes against Qatar energy continue

items.headline: Bank of Japan keeps rates steady as expected, warns Iran war may push up inflation

items.headline: Fed votes to hold rates steady, notes 'uncertain' impacts from Iran war
